problem_solved: Patients struggle to understand symptoms and determine appropriate care pathways, leading to delayed treatment or unnecessary healthcare utilization
solution_description: AI-powered symptom checker and health guidance platform. Provides personalized health assessments based on symptoms, medical history, and clinical knowledge base. Medical library with clinician-reviewed content. Supports patients in understanding conditions and finding appropriate care
traction_signals: Global symptom checker with medical library
Content created by doctors and grounded in research
B2B2C model with health system partnerships
notes: Strong European presence from Germany. Consumer-facing brand with B2B2C model. Medical library adds value beyond triage. German engineering credibility for clinical AI
